Text[0]: Behold, a new star, teeming with possibilities! Why not flaunt those artisanal skills once more? We'd be glad to have you!
As before, I'm charged with overseeing the entire operation. Rest assured, I'll be keeping both ears out for periodic progress reports!
Namingway puts a great deal of thought into his craft. It would mean a lot to him to share those sentiments with a peer.
Each star detected with the Phaenna Stellascope will receive due consideration. Once we have our next destination, we'll all hop back onto the <Emphasis>Galactic Way</Emphasis>!
Countless discoveries were made here on Phaenna, but this is only the beginning. What awaits us on our next jaunt, I wonder?
My stellar mission control duties have been expanded to include Phaenna. Suffice it to say my expectations for the team are no lower than before.
The completion of the Stellascope is a laudable feat, but there's still plenty around here to keep an eye on. No rest for the wicked, as they say.
If this star truly harbors the inspiration I seek, I have yet to find it at the Beacon...but where else is safe?
Heh, even the rum tastes better after a hard day's graft!
The Archive an' that bloody knife... Let's just 'ope it's a passin' fancy, an' not the start of a lifelong obsession.
Text[1]: Anyroad, there's plenty left to discover on that stone tablet of 'is. I'm sure Gerolt'll soon find an 'int or two for 'is next smithin' endeavor.

Text[0]: No malfunctions detected... Now we just need to secure a safe flight path.
Having left Sinus Ardorum, our bonds are stronger than ever. No matter whence we hail, we are all united under the banner of cosmic exploration.
Damn near brings a tear to me eye to see this base completed. May be as I run a tight ship, but I'm grateful to every last one of ye what heeded me orders.
Thanks again for taking part in the test flight. The engineering and research teams will work hand in hand to ensure we make the most of this data!
